title: rubus × flavidulus
intro: Rubus × flavidulus, also known as Yellow Himalayan Raspberry, is a hybrid species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × flavidulus include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant, protecting the body from free radicals. Rubus × flavidulus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
